data.title: Why Is Private Equity Giant Apollo Global Management Stock Shooting Higher Today?
data.description: Apollo and Santander partner on $370M infrastructure portfolio financing. APO aims for $50B in clean energy investments by 2027.

data.title: BioAge Labs, Riot Platforms And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Monday's Pre-Market Session
Super Micro Surges 10% On Monday Pre-Market After Company Gets Nasdaq Extension To File Annual Report
data.description: The delay was initially announced in August when Super Micro postponed its annual report to evaluate internal controls over financial reporting.

data.title: This Six Flags Entertainment Analyst Begins Coverage On A Bullish Note; Here Are Top 5 Initiations For Monday
Tesla Stock Hits $400 In Overnight Trading On Robinhood Amid Analyst Upgrades And FSD Optimism
data.description: Tesla Inc. shares surged past $400 in overnight trading, reaching $401.16 as of 12:11 am EST Monday in New York, approaching its all-time high of $407.36 set in November 2021.
